backend/main.mo: Main actor for the DCS Tech Inventory Management app, defining types and logic for user profiles, inventory items, adjustment logs, and role-based access control with admin/staff/guest roles.
backend/migration.mo: Simple migration module that accepts and returns the app state unchanged, serving as a no-op migration runner.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report file with an empty features array, indicating no features have been documented yet.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind CSS and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the DCS Tech Inventory Management frontend, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with protected and public routes, handles Internet Identity authentication, user profile loading, and renders the app layout with profile setup and approval flows.
frontend/src/components/AddItemModal.tsx: Modal dialog component for adding a new inventory item, containing a form with fields for name, SKU, category, quantity, pricing, and supplier, which submits via the useAddInventoryItem mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/InventoryItemDet: Modal dialog component that displays detailed information for a single inventory item, shows its adjustment log history, and allows staff/admin users to add or remove stock quantities.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Application shell component providing a responsive sidebar navigation with role-based menu filtering, a user avatar dropdown for sign-out, and a mobile-friendly menu toggle.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that collects a new user's name and email, then saves their profile via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A button component that toggles between light and dark themes using the `useTheme` hook, displaying a Sun or Moon icon accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via `AuthClient`.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the app, covering user profile CRUD, inventory item management, and adjustment log operations against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: A thin wrapper around `next-themes`'s `useTheme` that exposes a boolean `isDark` flag and a `toggle` function for switching between light and dark modes.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that defines Tailwind base layers, imports Google Fonts, and declares OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including sidebar and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` wrapping the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: An admin-only page that displays all users in a table with controls to approve, reject, change roles, and delete users, plus buttons to seed demo inventory and users.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying inventory summary stats, low-stock alerts, recent adjustment logs, and user count cards with role-aware visibility and navigation to filtered inventory views.
frontend/src/pages/Inventory.tsx: Inventory list page with search, stock-level filtering, and URL-param-driven item selection; supports admin-only item creation via a modal and opens a detail panel on row click.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, redirects to the dashboard on success, and displays app features and branding.
frontend/src/pages/Reports.tsx: Reports page showing a filterable, date-range-searchable table of inventory adjustment logs, restricted to admin and staff roles.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helpers to read URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persist them in sessionStorage, and remove sensitive params from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Space Grotesk), oklch-based color tokens mapped to CSS variables, border radius, box shadows, and keyframe animations. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state descriptor for the DCS Tech Inventory Management app, documenting architecture (Motoko backend, React/TypeScript/Vite/Tailwind frontend), existing features, known issues (bootstrap admin problem), and versioned feature/requirement metadata.
